evals.name: correct-archive-path
evals.prompt: 归档已完成的 OpenSpec: spec_path=openspec/changes/user-auth, project_root=/workspace/my-project, expected_archive=openspec/archive/user-auth
expectations: Should archive to project/openspec/archive/ not standards/
Should correctly resolve project root for archive path
Should confirm the archive destination path

evals.name: already-archived-detection
evals.prompt: 检测已归档的 OpenSpec: spec_path=openspec/changes/user-auth, check_archive=openspec/archive/user-auth, detect_duplicates=true
expectations: Should detect that spec is already archived
Should prevent creating a duplicate archive
Should report where the existing archive is located
